name: hk-skills
description: hk's personal Claude Code skill marketplace, organized into opt-in plugin bundles for common development workflows, web, React Native, and Supabase.

plugins.name: dev
plugins.description: Web frontend (React/Next) 팀 컨벤션 스킬: 컴포넌트·Context·Next.js App Router·Tailwind·TanStack Query 패턴 + client/server API-only 경계(브라우저 DB 직접접근·secret 노출 차단).

plugins.name: hk
plugins.description: hk personal cross-project custom commands. /hk:pre-clear:save & /hk:pre-clear:resume — hand off session context around /clear (writes/reads .hk/pre-clear/handoff.md).

plugins.name: orca
plugins.description: Standalone Orca orchestration bundle. Skill `orca-workers` — coordinate parallel sub-worktree workers for one feature/page cycle (provision → brief → supervised dispatch → cross-model Codex review → fix loop → integration landing). Command mechanics delegate to Orca's own orca-cli/orchestration skills.
